title: Furiusfighters TAB
description: A Tablist Plugin Made by Furiusfighter213
body:
# FuriusfighterTAB - Advanced Minecraft Tablist Plugin

Create a stunning, fully customizable tablist experience for your Minecraft server!

## Features

✨ **Custom Rank System**
- 5 pre-configured ranks: Owner (⚡), Admin (●), Developer (⚙), Mod (★), Player
- Add unlimited custom ranks with unique colors and prefixes
- Automatic rank sorting by priority
- UUID-based storage (survives player name changes)

📊 **Real-Time Player Information**
- Live ping display with color coding (Green ≤50ms, Yellow 51-150ms, Red >150ms)
- Player count and server capacity display
- Dynamic formatting with customizable prefixes and suffixes

🎨 **Dynamic Header & Footer**
- Fully customizable header and footer text
- Support for color codes and decorative symbols
- Placeholder support: {player}, {ping}, {rank}, {online}, {max}, and more
- Multiple color schemes (Default, Dark, Rainbow)

⚙️ **Complete Configuration System**
- 5 YAML configuration files for easy customization
- No coding required - edit config files and reload with `/tab reload`
- Per-rank customization options
- Message and color scheme templates included

🔐 **Permissions & Security**
- OP-only access for admin commands
- Permission nodes for each command
- Secure rank management system

## Commands

- `/tab reload` - Reload all configurations
- `/tab setrank <player> <rank>` - Assign a player to a rank
- `/tab header <text>` - Set custom header
- `/tab footer <text>` - Set custom footer
- `/tab info` - View player rank information

## Requirements

- **Minecraft Server**: Spigot 1.21+
- **Java**: Java 17 or higher
- **No Dependencies**: Pure Spigot API (no NMS required)

## Placeholders

Use these in your config files:
- `{player}` - Player username
- `{ping}` - Current ping in milliseconds
- `{rank}` - Rank display name
- `{prefix}` - Rank prefix
- `{suffix}` - Rank suffix
- `{online}` - Online player count
- `{max}` - Server max capacity

## Default Ranks

| Rank | Color | Priority | Display |
|------|-------|----------|---------|
| Owner | Red | 100 | ⚡ OWNER |
| Admin | Red | 90 | ● ADMIN |
| Developer | Purple | 80 | ⚙ DEVELOPER |
| Mod | Blue | 70 | ★ MOD |
| Player | Gray | 0 | Player |

## Configuration Files

- `config.yml` - Main settings and refresh rate
- `ranks.yml` - Rank definitions and properties
- `users.yml` - Player-to-rank mappings (auto-generated)
- `messages.yml` - Custom messages and responses
- `colors.yml` - Color schemes and ping thresholds

## Installation

1. Download the plugin JAR file
2. Place in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Customize `plugins/FuriusfighterTAB/` config files as needed
5. Use `/tab reload` to apply changes

## Performance

- Optimized with async updates every 1 second (configurable)
- Minimal server impact
- Efficient UUID-based data storage
- No database required (YAML storage)

## Support & Features

- ✅ Fully Spigot-compatible (no NMS hacks)
- ✅ Compatible with 1.21+ versions
- ✅ No external dependencies
- ✅ Lightweight (~21KB)
- ✅ Production-ready

Perfect for servers wanting advanced player tablist customization!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Made By Furiusfighter213
